name: phela-monorepo
description: Vietnamese milk-tea shop management system monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/customer"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/customer
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/customer
